title: stelis sarae
intro: Stelis sarae is a species of orchid, specifically a type of epiphyte that belongs to the genus Stelis. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential candidate for the treatment of infections and wounds. The health benefits of Stelis sarae include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. Herbal preparations of Stelis sarae can be made by infusing the plant in water or oil, which can then be used as a topical treatment for various health issues.
